description.en: Get a Bluesky user's profile information including followers and post count.
description.de: Profilinformationen eines Bluesky-Benutzers abrufen, einschließlich Follower und Beitragsanzahl.

vars.ACCESS_TOKEN: env:BLUESKY_ACCESS_TOKEN|Get your access token from Bluesky app settings

inputs.name: Actor

description.en: The handle or DID of the user (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social' or 'did:plc:...').

inputs.bot: The Bluesky handle (e.g., 'alice.bsky.social') or DID (e.g., 'did:plc:xyz123') of the user whose profile to retrieve.
